Who can apply

1. Take a photo of your passport.
2. Scan the chip in your passport.
3. Scan your face.
4. Take a photo of yourself.
5. Answer some questions about yourself.

reviews.title: Would be amazing if it didn’t lose projects
reviews.content: I am paying for pro and have created 3 total projects. The results are incredible. I was so impressed. That is until my 3rd project disappeared. I worked with Claude to try to resolve by testing about six different possible problems. Finally asked for help from the support chat which finally led to chat saying I need human support. 24 hours later and nothing. Please fix whatever has caused this and please actually offer human support once all AI supports have failed. I will not be renewing Pro.

reviews.title: Paid First, Banned Later, No Refund
reviews.content:
I subscribed to Claude Pro expecting a reliable AI service, but my account was suddenly restricted simply because I am a user from China. What makes this even more disappointing is that there was no reasonable refund process for the remaining subscription period.

Paying customers should not lose access to a service without fair notice, clear explanations, or appropriate compensation. If regional restrictions exist, they should be communicated before accepting payment, not after.

As a result, I have cancelled my subscription and switched to Codex/OpenAI tools for my daily work. So far, the experience has been much more stable and transparent.

Very disappointed with how Anthropic handled this situation. I cannot recommend paying for Claude unless the company improves its account policies and customer support.

reviews.title: Poor customer service and issues with the limits, even though I pay a subscription
reviews.content:
I used to find Gemini incredibly helpful and efficient for answering questions, but my recent experience has been completely unacceptable. I pay for a monthly subscription and never used to have limitation issues. However, this morning, on my very first request of the day, I received an error saying I had "reached my limit." Being locked out when I haven't even used the tool that day is ridiculous.

To make matters worse, the customer service experience was awful. After multiple attempts and being hung up on, the individual who finally answered was extremely rude and I was not able to get a hold of a supervisor.

This platform has the potential to be a strong tool, but with consistent errors popping up and terrible support, I strongly recommend finding another way and moving away from this service.
